title: Police warn Syracuse businesses of fraudulent zoning invoice scam
summary: Syracuse Police Department and Department of Neighborhood and Business Development issued a public warning about fraudulent zoning invoice scams targeting city businesses. Fake invoices requesting wire transfers for approval, submission, environmental impact, and review fees have targeted at least three businesses. The city clarified it never requests wire transfers for zoning fees and provided contact numbers for verification and reporting.
department_refs: Department of Neighborhood and Business Development

political_signal.description: Public safety alert indicating emerging fraud threat to business community; requires CIO attention for potential digital security vulnerabilities in city permitting systems or email authentication controls.
